title: "King Of Kings And Lord Of Lords" I Timothy 6:13-21

notes.introduction: A closing sermon on 1 Timothy 6:13-21 in which the preacher presents Paul's charge to Timothy as a call to continue and finish the Christian race, grounding that charge in three truths about the Lord Jesus Christ: his power, his position, and his plan.
outline: I. God's Power: he quickeneth all things and has power over life and death (vv. 13-16)
II. God's Position: he is the blessed and only potentate, King of kings and Lord of lords (v. 15)
III. God's Plan: the appearing of the Lord Jesus Christ as motivation to keep the commandment until the end (vv. 14-19)
